CustomFunction.name: QueryBuildWhereBooleanPrefix
QueryBuildInPlaceholders
QueryAppendBindings
QueryMergeBindings
QueryPrependBindings
QueryBuildJoins
QueryBuildWheres
QueryBuildGroupBys
QueryBuildHavings
QueryBuildOrderBys
QueryBuildBindingArgs
QueryBuildUnions
QueryBuildSelects
QueryFieldFormat
QueryBuildSelectKeys
QueryBuildJsonRow
QueryBuildJsonRows
QueryNew
QuerySelect
QuerySelectSub
QueryDistinct
CustomFunction.Calculation: // Adds SELECT DISTINCT to the query. Applies to all selected columns. JSONSetElement ( query ; "distinct" ; 1 ; JSONBoolean )

CustomFunction.name: QueryWhere
QueryOrWhere
QueryWhereIn
QueryWhereNotIn
QueryOrWhereIn
QueryWhereNull
QueryWhereNotNull
QueryOrWhereNull
QueryOrWhereNotNull
QueryWhereBetween
QueryWhereNotBetween
QueryOrWhereBetween
QueryOrWhereNotBetween
QueryWhereColumn
QueryWhereGroup
QueryOrWhereGroup
QueryWhereRaw
QueryOrWhereRaw
QueryWhereInSubquery
QueryWhereNotInSubquery
QueryWhereExists
QueryWhereNotExists
QueryJoin
QueryLeftJoin
QueryRightJoin
QueryCrossJoin
QueryJoinSub
QueryLeftJoinSub
QueryOrderBy
QueryOrderByRaw
QueryReorder
QueryGroupBy
QueryGroupByRaw
QueryHaving
QueryOrHaving
QueryHavingRaw
QueryOrHavingRaw
QueryLimit
CustomFunction.Calculation: JSONSetElement ( query ; "limit" ; value ; JSONNumber )

CustomFunction.name: QueryOffset
CustomFunction.Calculation: JSONSetElement ( query ; "offset" ; value ; JSONNumber )

CustomFunction.name: QueryForPage
QueryFromSubquery
QueryUnion
QueryToSQL
QueryGet
QueryGetResultsAsJson
QueryCount
QuerySum
QueryAvg
QueryMax
QueryMin
QueryWhen
JSONGetElementNamedLikeField
